MAPPING.DESCRIPTION:
IFDYN-M-0-5
Dec 2016 Shuping Han ------------------------------- updated mapping by indirect cost CR to add one source
MAPPING.NAME: m_DM_RRAP_Ins_DRVD_MTH_INDRCT_COST_SUM

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT
MBR.MTH_TM_ID,
MBR.TOT_INDRCT_COST_AMT
FROM GDAW.MBR_INDRCT_COST_MTH_SNAPSHOT MBR WHERE MBR.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT DISTINCT mth_tm_id,
(SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT a , GDAW.PD_SEG_ACCT_XREF b WHERE a.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND b.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND a.BNS_DLQNT_DAY>=30 AND a.BASEL_ACCT_ID=b.BASEL_ACCT_ID)
+ ( SELECT COUNT(*) from BASEL_PNL_LN_PD_SEG_ACCT_XREF t2, GDAW.BASEL_PSNL_LOAN_MTH_SNAPSHOT t1 WHERE t1.BASEL_ACCT_ID=t2.basel_acct_id and t1.MTH_TM_ID=t2.MTH_TM_ID AND t1.DAY_ODUE>0 AND t1.mth_tm_id=$$TM_ID) +
(select COUNT (*) from GDAW.BASEL_MORT_ACCT_DRVD_VARS t1 where t1.DLQNT_DAY_CNT>0 AND t1.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID) FROM GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT WHERE mth_tm_id =$$TM_ID

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period

TASK.DESCRIPTION:
IFDYN-C-0-4
(where the main script is called from) $$SCRIPT_DIR=/owdev/scripts (the environment; DEV, SYS, UAT, PROD) $$ENVMNT=DEV (the project folder without prefix) $$PROJ_FOLDR=STGN_SCENE (the workflow and session name for the abend log file and triger) $$WRKFLW_SESS=wf_STGN_SCENE_Load_DIMs.s_STGN_SCENE_INS_UPD_SCENE_MBR_ACCT_ACTY_TP_DIM
TASK.NAME: cmd_post_session_failure_alert

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails
Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT
MBR.MTH_TM_ID,
MBR.TOT_INDRCT_COST_AMT
FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.MBR_INDRCT_COST_MTH_SNAPSHOT MBR WHERE MBR.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT DISTINCT mth_tm_id,
(SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT a , $$TBL_PRE_4.PD_SEG_ACCT_XREF b WHERE a.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND b.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND a.BNS_DLQNT_DAY>=30 AND a.BASEL_ACCT_ID=b.BASEL_ACCT_ID)
+ ( SELECT COUNT(*) from $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_PNL_LN_PD_SEG_ACCT_XREF t2, $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_PSNL_LOAN_MTH_SNAPSHOT t1 WHERE t1.BASEL_ACCT_ID=t2.basel_acct_id and t1.MTH_TM_ID=t2.MTH_TM_ID AND t1.DAY_ODUE>0 AND t1.mth_tm_id=$$TM_ID) +
(select COUNT (*) from $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_MORT_ACCT_DRVD_VARS t1 where t1.DLQNT_DAY_CNT>0 AND t1.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID) FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT WHERE mth_tm_id =$$TM_ID

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_DRVD_MTH_INDRCT_COST_SUM.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_DRVD_MTH_INDRCT_COST_SUM.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_DRVD_MTH_INDRCT_COST_SUM.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Del_DRVD_MTH_INDRCT_COST_SUM.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Del_DRVD_MTH_INDRCT_COST_SUM.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Del_DRVD_MTH_INDRCT_COST_SUM.ErrorMsg

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub

FOLDER.NAME: SHARED
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Where all shared objects will reside. Only save sources, targets, transformations and mapplets in this folder. Never save any mappings in here!!!!
